title: 🐔Cluckin' CHICKS🐤 - DATAPACK
description: Add some new variants for chickens, new eggs & fried egg food
body:
![Cluckin Chicks title :u](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5caf2347718ab14c2d1cc4336686096ef15351.png)

**Cluckin Chicks data pack gives new custom variants to chicken**
##

- Requires the RESOURCE PACK: [**Cluckin' CHICKS**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cluckin-chicks)
- Adds tails to temperate and warm chicken (when not using EMF/Optifine)
- Adds Eggs for all custom variants
- Adds Fried Egg Food
- Compatible with [CLUCKING DUCKS datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clucking-ducks) (so it means, duck variant is possible)

![1.0/+ CHICKENS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9e4737126aea22de2f047c217e39274ec693beb.png)
![1.2/+ CHICKENS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62fd91248e31bfaa64eb83501bb6479b873c5a87.png)



<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>
Fried Egg: 
Cooks slightly faster than other items, also can be eaten pretty quick (1 second)
3 Nutrition (1.5 Hunger bar points) ~ 2 Saturation ~ Stackable to 64
</details>

<details>
<summary>CHICKEN WIKI</summary>

|TYPE                 | Where to find          | Egg Type                |
|---------------------|:----------------------:|------------------------:|
|White/Yellow Chick   | Temperate Biomes       | Vanilla Egg             |
|Orange/Brown         | Warm Biomes            | Vanilla Brown Egg       |
|Blue/Gray            | Cold Biomes            | Vanilla Blue Egg        |
|Wild Chicken         | Jungle Biomes          | CUSTOM Wild Egg         |
|Raven Chicken        | Dark Forest/Pale Garden| CUSTOM Black Egg        |
|Cluckshroom Chicken  | Mushroom Fields        | CUSTOM EggShroom        |

</details>
